style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a Persian palace of white marble struck by incoming missiles, columns partially collapsing in crimson-amber flames with black smoke rising
subject.focal_point: a collapsing Persian dome fragmented in mid-explosion
subject.secondary: No human figures visible; shattered tiles and floating gold debris in mid-air, orange licks of flame illuminating ornate architectural details

environment.location: exterior of Aiatola palace in Tehran

composition.rule: rule of thirds with collapsing central mass
composition.foreground: marble columns and flames in saturated crimson and ochre
composition.midground: collapsing dome fragmented, gold debris mid-air
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white skyline of Persian city with smoke plumes

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber flame highlights, anamorphic flare

symbolism.secondary: columns as collapsing pillars of an old order

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
